# LeetCode Daily — Rust × TypeScript × PHP

[![CI](https://github.com/jh3ady/leetcode/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/jh3ady/leetcode/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green.svg)](./LICENSE)
[![Contributor Covenant](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contributor%20Covenant-2.1-4baaaa.svg)](./CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
[![Rust](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-stable-orange?logo=rust&logoColor=white)](./leetcode-rs)
[![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-6-blue?logo=typescript&logoColor=white)](./leetcode-ts)
[![PHP](https://img.shields.io/badge/PHP-8.5+-777bb4?logo=php&logoColor=white)](./leetcode-php)

One LeetCode problem per day, solved in Rust, TypeScript and PHP, strictly test-driven.

## Goals

- **Stay sharp.** One problem per day across three very different type systems.
- **Test-first.** Every solution starts with a failing test.
- **Comparable.** Same problem, three idiomatic implementations side by side.

## Repository layout

```
.
├── leetcode-rs/      # Rust  (cargo test)
├── leetcode-ts/      # TypeScript (vitest)
├── leetcode-php/     # PHP (phpunit)
├── scripts/          # Scaffolder + README generator
├── problems.json     # Source of truth for the solved list
└── .github/          # CI, issue/PR templates, automation
```

## Quick start

```bash
# install
pnpm install
composer install -d leetcode-php

# run every test suite
pnpm test

# scaffold a new problem in all three languages
pnpm new -- --id 42 --slug "trapping-rain-water" --title "Trapping Rain Water" --difficulty hard
```

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full workflow.

## Stack

| Language   | Tooling                              | Tests  |
|------------|--------------------------------------|--------|
| Rust       | Cargo, rustfmt, clippy               | `cargo test` |
| TypeScript | pnpm, tsc, eslint, prettier          | Vitest |
| PHP        | Composer, PHPStan, PHP-CS-Fixer      | PHPUnit |
